subject: refactor(ui): remove zoom controls feature entirely
body:
Zoom controls were broken on mobile (overflow clipping made them appear
non-functional) and added complexity without sufficient value. Canvas
now always auto-fits to available space, which is the expected behavior.

Tags: ui, zoom, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: minor
title: remove zoom controls feature entirely
